title: Frank Brandishes an Overly-Dramatic Robot Pilot
description: This video came in 1st place in Captain Fawful's Earthbound YTPMV contest. I honestly didn't expect to place so high, but I'm thrilled and honored that I did. Thank you all very much for your support!
